summary: Testing iteration 23 - Update mode for bug fixes: Character Builder BACKGROUNDS.map error, Dice Roller position, and Character Sheet theme. All 15 new tests pass covering the 3 bug fixes.

breakdown.character-builder-bugfixes.spec.ts: 7 passed - Character Builder renders, BACKGROUNDS shows names correctly, 5 steps for casters, subclass selection, spell selection, feat selection, non-caster has Features label
breakdown.dice-roller-position.spec.ts: 5 passed - Dice Roller button at bottom-LEFT, panel opens at bottom-LEFT, functionality works, can be closed, custom roll input works
breakdown.character-sheet-theme.spec.ts: 3 passed - Character Sheet Full with themed UI, Character Builder dark theme, quick stats bar visible

seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own test user via registration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) BACKGROUNDS dropdown shows background names (not [Object object]), 2) Dice Roller button and panel positioned at bottom-LEFT, 3) Character Sheet uses dark theme (#0D0D0D background) and blue accent. Character Builder has 5 steps with subclass/spell/feat selection for casters.

character_builder_backgrounds_fix.description: BACKGROUNDS.map now uses b.name - dropdown shows proper background names like 'Acolyte', 'Charlatan', 'Folk Hero' etc.

character_builder_5_steps.description: Character Builder shows 5 steps: Concept, Race & Class, Abilities, Spells & Feats (or Features), Details

character_builder_subclass_selection.description: Step 4 shows subclass options - e.g. Wizard shows School of Evocation, Abjuration, Conjuration, etc.

character_builder_spell_selection.description: Step 4 shows cantrip selection (Fire Bolt, Light, etc.) and 1st level spell selection (Magic Missile, Shield, etc.) for caster classes

character_builder_feat_selection.description: Step 4 shows Optional Starting Feat section with feats like Alert, Lucky, War Caster

dice_roller_bottom_left.description: Dice Roller button and panel positioned at bottom-LEFT (left: 24px, bottom: 24px) for better UX

character_sheet_dark_theme.description: Character Sheet uses dark theme with #0D0D0D background and blue accent color
